channel.title: Multilingua
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Multilingua

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Robert Hanks, Mark Turin, H. Henny Yeung DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2024-frontmatter6

item.title: Shorter but richer versus longer with less information: linguistic differentiation between British Sign Language and sign supported English
item.description: Article by Robert Hanks, Mark Turin, H. Henny Yeung DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2023-0177

item.title: LINCing learners to digital literacy: supporting social integration and English language learning during COVID-19
item.description: Article by Robert Hanks, Mark Turin, H. Henny Yeung DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2024-0024
